name: socketfi_social_payments_router.optimized
stderr: ⚠️  `stellar contract optimize` is deprecated and will be removed in future versions of the CLI. Use `stellar contract build --optimize` instead.

functions.name: add_voter
functions.doc:
Add governance voter.

Notes:
- Admin only.

functions.name: cast_vote
functions.doc:
Cast vote on active proposal.

Notes:
- Voter must authorize.

functions.name: get_nonce
functions.doc:
Get current payment nonce.

Notes:
- Used for payment id generation.
- Also tracks created payment sequence.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.doc:
Update admin.

Notes:
- Admin only.
- Changes control over privileged router actions.

functions.name: get_payment
functions.doc: Get a stored payment by id.

functions.name: remove_voter
functions.doc:
Remove governance voter.

Notes:
- Admin only.

functions.name: apply_upgrade
functions.doc:
Execute approved upgrade proposal.

Notes:
- Admin only.
- Applies the current passed proposal.

functions.name: claim_payment
functions.doc:
Claim a single pending payment.

Notes:
- Requires claimer auth.
- Claim validation is delegated to `claim_one`.

functions.name: pay_to_social
functions.doc:
Pay to a social identity.

Notes:
- Requires sender auth.
- Asset must be supported.
- Sends directly if registry resolves a wallet.
- Otherwise stores a pending payment and indexes it by identity and sender.

functions.name: claim_payments
functions.doc:
Claim multiple pending payments.

Notes:
- Requires claimer auth.
- Processes claims sequentially.
- Entire call fails if any claim fails.

functions.name: refund_payment
functions.doc:
Refund a single payment.

Notes:
- Requires sender auth.
- Refund eligibility is delegated to `refund_one`.

functions.name: cancel_proposal
functions.doc:
Cancel active proposal.

Notes:
- Admin only.

functions.name: propose_upgrade
functions.doc:
Create upgrade proposal.

Notes:
- Admin only.
- Starts governance flow for a new wasm hash.

functions.name: refund_payments
functions.doc:
Refund multiple payments.

Notes:
- Requires sender auth.
- Processes refunds sequentially.
- Entire call fails if any refund fails.

functions.name: add_supported_asset
functions.doc:
Add supported asset.

Notes:
- Admin only.
- Enables new payments in the asset.

functions.name: get_claimable_total
functions.doc:
Get total currently claimable amount for identity and asset.

Notes:
- Includes only pending, unexpired payments matching the asset.
- Excludes expired and already processed payments.

functions.name: get_sender_payments
functions.doc: Get payment ids created by sender.

functions.name: get_supported_assets
functions.doc: Get all supported assets.

functions.name: get_identity_payments
functions.doc: Get payment ids for `(platform, user_id)`.

functions.name: remove_supported_asset
functions.doc:
Remove supported asset.

Notes:
- Admin only.
- Blocks new payments in the asset.
